news.headline: Viktor Orban swept from power after 16 years ruling Hungary
news.summary: In a record turnout at the polls, Hungarians have voted out their long-serving, far-right Prime Minister Viktor Orban.

news.headline: Australia appoints first female army chief in ‘historic’ reshuffle of military top brass
news.summary:
Australia said on Monday that a woman would lead ⁠its army for ⁠the first time in history, ⁠as part of a reshuffle of the country’s defence force leadership.
Lieutenant General Susan Coyle, the current chief of joint capabilities, will become chief of army in July, the government said in a statement
